description: Export GNPS Feature-Based Molecular Networking (FBMN) inputs: an MGF of MS2 spectra (from a consensusXML linked across samples) plus the GNPS quantification table. Upload both to GNPS FBMN.
rules: CONSENSUS is a consensusXML linked across samples
MZML is a space-separated list of source mzML files (with MS2)
writes gnps_export.mgf and gnps_export_quant.txt under record_store
usage: Set CONSENSUS (consensusXML) and MZML (space-separated mzML). Output: gnps_export.mgf (+ gnps_export_quant.txt).
limitation: Requires pyOpenMS 3.5.0 (Python 3.9+) to produce real content; if absent the porter still creates gnps_export.mgf and records the reason.
